name: Reviewgrower
description:
What Reviewgrower Does

Reviewgrower is a white label review and reputation management tool that can be white labeled by agencies or resellers. Agency partners can use the tool for their clients or also resell it to other agencies or partners for an additional revenue stream.

Source: Reviewgrower.com

Key Features

  • Helps generate reviews across multiple platforms
  • Helps monitor reviews with capabilities to filter by location, source, timeline, and ratings
  • Offers a completely white label dashboard for agencies to brand and resell
  • Offers a scalable and customizable infrastructure

Pricing

$199 per month for agencies for up to 20 locations. $10 per additional location.

Pros

✅The platform is developing fast and they incorporate feedback well

✅They have a negative feedback manager

✅Offers embeddable widgets for sharing reviews

Cons

❌Platform is very expensive, especially for businesses with multiple locations

❌Doesn’t offer bulk response options for reviews

❌Growing platform so longer development times for certain features
what_people_say:
“I like that Review Grower is a progressive and developing app. They operate on user feedback and incorporate the ideas and suggestions of users into the platform when it makes sense to do so.”

   - Review collected by and hosted on G2.com

‍

“Some features take longer to develop inside the platform than other things, which takes time. I hate waiting sometimes. But they are doing a good job.”

   - Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
